rationale: Starter routes all live-DOM markup through one local wrapper. Exact semantic fingerprints classify the wrapper implementation and every caller separately so source-static, escaped, and Press-rendered inputs cannot be conflated or moved without review.

wrappers.name: setHtml
wrappers.rationale: setHtml is the Starter render wrapper; each call site is classified by the actual source provenance supplied to it.

approved.rationale: The error view passes only the source-static Page not found heading to the reviewed live-DOM wrapper.
Each card title and router-produced href is escaped before interpolation; the empty-list fallback is a source-static paragraph.
The loading view passes only the source-static Loading paragraph to the reviewed live-DOM wrapper.
The heading is escaped by Starter and markdownHtml is supplied by Press's reviewed Markdown rendering boundary before the combined template reaches the wrapper.
The tab heading is escaped by Starter and markdownHtml is supplied by Press's reviewed Markdown rendering boundary before the combined template reaches the wrapper.
This is the sole local live-DOM write and does not sanitize by itself; approval depends on the exact policy separately classifying every setHtml caller and forbidding unreviewed wrapper-call growth.
